mapper.sql: CASE A.VCATN_SE WHEN '01' THEN '연차' WHEN '02' THEN '오전반차' WHEN '03' THEN '오후반차' WHEN '04' THEN '병가' WHEN '05' THEN '공가' ELSE A.VCATN_SE END
mapper.select: SELECT OCCRRNC_YEAR AS occrrncYear, USER_ID AS usid, YRYC_OCCRRNC_CO AS occrncYrycCo, USE_YRYC_CO AS useYrycCo, REMNDR_YRYC_CO AS remndrYrycCo FROM TB_INDVDL_YRYC_MANAGE WHERE OCCRRNC_YEAR = #{occrrncYear} AND USER_ID = #{usid}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_INDVDL_YRYC_MANAGE SET USE_YRYC_CO = #{useYrycCo}, REMNDR_YRYC_CO = #{remndrYrycCo}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OCCRRNC_YEAR = #{occrrncYear} AND USER_ID = #{usid}
mapper.sql: A.APPLCNT_ID AS applcntId, A.VCATN_SE AS vcatnSe, A.OCCRRNC_YEAR AS occrrncYear, A.REQST_DE AS reqstDe, A.VCATN_RESN AS vcatnResn, A.SANCTNER_ID AS sanctnerId, (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.SANCTNER_ID) AS sanctnerNm, A.CONFM_AT AS confmAt, A.SANCTN_DT AS sanctnDt, A.RETURN_RESN AS returnResn, A.BGNDE AS bgnde, A.ENDDE AS endde, A.NOON_SE AS noonSe, A.INFRML_SANCTN_ID AS infrmlSanctnId, AS vcatnSeNm
AND A.APPLCNT_ID = #{applcntId} AND A.BGNDE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%')
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_VCATN_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_VCATN_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_VCATN_MANAGE A WHERE A.APPLCNT_ID = #{applcntId} AND A.VCATN_SE = #{vcatnSe} AND A.BGNDE = #{bgnde} AND A.ENDDE = #{endde}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_VCATN_MANAGE A WHERE A.APPLCNT_ID = #{applcntId} AND A.BGNDE = #{bgnde} AND A.ENDDE = #{endde}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_VCATN_MANAGE A WHERE A.SANCTNER_ID = #{sanctnerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_VCATN_MANAGE (APPLCNT_ID, VCATN_SE, OCCRRNC_YEAR, BGNDE, ENDDE, REQST_DE, VCATN_RESN, NOON_SE, SANCTNER_ID, CONFM_AT, INFRML_SANCTN_ID, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{applcntId}, #{vcatnSe}, #{occrrncYear}, #{bgnde}, #{endde}, #{reqstDe}, #{vcatnResn}, #{noonSe}, #{sanctnerId}, 'N', #{infrmlSanctnId}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_VCATN_MANAGE SET VCATN_RESN = #{vcatnResn}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE APPLCNT_ID = #{applcntId} AND VCATN_SE = #{vcatnSe} AND BGNDE = #{bgnde} AND ENDDE = #{endde}

UPDATE TB_VCATN_MANAGE SET CONFM_AT = #{confmAt}, SANCTN_DT = #{sanctnDt}, RETURN_RESN = #{returnResn}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE APPLCNT_ID = #{applcntId} AND VCATN_SE = #{vcatnSe} AND BGNDE = #{bgnde} AND ENDDE = #{endde}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_VCATN_MANAGE WHERE APPLCNT_ID = #{applcntId} AND VCATN_SE = #{vcatnSe} AND BGNDE = #{bgnde} AND ENDDE = #{endde}
